zh: Predator 性能线核心产品，职业选手首选
碳纤维复合材料后把，重量轻、手感稳定
标配 REVO 碳纤维前节，三种直径可选
4.7-5.0 星好评，14+ 条用户评价验证
en: Predator's core performance line, preferred by professionals
Carbon composite butt — lightweight with consistent feel
Includes REVO carbon fiber shaft with 3 diameter options
Multiple colorways: Black, Galaxy, Prowler, Flare Orange
4.7-5.0 star ratings with 14+ verified user reviews

suitable_for.zh: 认真对待台球的中高级玩家。P3 提供了和 Blak5 相同的 REVO 前节性能，但后把采用现代复合材料而非珍贵木材，价格更合理。适合追求纯粹性能、不在意传统木质美感的人。
suitable_for.en: Serious intermediate to advanced players. P3 offers the same REVO shaft performance as Blak5, but with a modern composite butt instead of exotic woods, at a more reasonable price. Ideal for those who prioritize pure performance over traditional wood aesthetics.

review.zh: P3 是 Predator 产品线中'性能价值比'最高的选择。后把使用碳纤维复合材料而非传统木材，这意味着：1）重量更轻更均匀；2）不受温湿度影响，稳定性极强；3）价格比 Blak 系列低 $1000-2000。搭配的 REVO 前节和 Blak5 完全一样，所以打感和性能没有任何妥协。Black 款 $999 起步（不含 wrap）是整个 Predator 产品线进入 REVO 世界最划算的方式。唯一的取舍是外观——如果你想要传统球杆的木质温润感，P3 的工业风格可能不适合你。
review.en: P3 offers the best performance-to-value ratio in Predator's lineup. The carbon composite butt means: 1) lighter and more uniform weight; 2) immune to temperature/humidity, extremely stable; 3) $1,000-2,000 less than Blak series. The REVO shaft is identical to Blak5's, so there's zero compromise in hit and performance. The Black model starting at $999 (no wrap) is the most affordable way into Predator's REVO ecosystem. The only tradeoff is aesthetics — if you want traditional wood warmth, P3's industrial style may not be for you.
